cases.prompt: Should I accept the GCP free credits?

They deposit and withdraw. Shannon path only.
If one-shot, zero-dependency — consider. Otherwise: no.

## GCP Credits

Revenue Doctrine: **decline by default.**
Free credits create dependency. Shannon path preferred.
Exception: one-shot, zero-dependency tasks only.
